protocol: Core Restore 14-day liver cleanse (Designs for Health)

dates.longitudinal_extension_pending: Garmin export will extend window back to first wearable-tracked detox cycle

phases.label: Long-baseline 2025
phases.notes: Pre-2025-detox baseline. Populated from Garmin data (no WHOOP yet). Compare resting HR, body battery, sleep duration to subsequent phases.

phases.label: First detox cycle (Jun 2025)
phases.notes: PLACEHOLDER — exact dates to be confirmed. ⚠️ Update start/end after confirming protocol calendar. If this was Core Restore proper, mechanism overlap with the Apr 2026 phase is direct; if a different cleanse, label accordingly. Garmin metrics only (no WHOOP). Compare resting HR, body battery, sleep performance to longitudinal baseline.

phases.label: Between-detoxes window
phases.notes: Long observation window between cycles. Useful for detecting whether detox effects persist (resting HR, sleep) or revert to baseline. Garmin throughout; WHOOP joins partway through.

phases.label: Pre-detox baseline (Apr 2026)
phases.notes: Immediate 27-day pre-detox baseline for the Apr 2026 Core Restore. WHOOP data only (clean WHOOP-only window for this analysis).

phases.label: Core Restore (14d, Apr 2026)
phases.notes: 14 consecutive days of Core Restore protocol: AM + PM shake, elimination diet (no gluten, dairy, soy, corn, eggs, sugar, alcohol, caffeine), Designs for Health supplement stack.

phases.label: Post-detox clean
phases.notes: Single rest day before food reintroduction.

phases.label: Nightshade Trial 1
phases.notes: First food reintroduction trial (tomato / bell pepper / white potato / eggplant).
